title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2026
summary:
Main
Today's iron ore market trended higher before easing off. The most active contract I2609 closed at 784 yuan/tonne,up 0.64% from the previous session. Spot prices edged down by 0-2 yuan/tonne day-on-day.
